notes: REDACTED EXAMPLE — a schema illustration, not a live census. The operator's real classifications live outside this repo at ~/.local/share/unitares/automation-overrides.json (override path: UNITARES_AUTOMATION_OVERRIDES). This committed copy carries only generic examples.

Verifier-centric model. owner = the accountable principal (a person), NOT the verifier. escalates_to = the machine verifier/gate that grounds the row in truth. notes carry a gate-class the dashboard renders as a role-reversal scorecard: gate:machine (a machine check verifies it), gate:human (a person is the gate — fragile), gate:ungated (nothing verifies it — faith-based risk), gate:external (a third party verifies it). dashboard_priority floats the un-inverted rows (ungated, then human) to the top.
Keyed by census id, e.g. launchd:<label>, codex:<task>, cron:<name>.

launchd:com.example.nightly-backup.escalates_to: artifact integrity check (e.g. gzip -t) + per-artifact completion marker + status JSON + non-zero exit on failure

codex:weekly-report.escalates_to: human review of the generated report before it ships
codex:weekly-report.description: Generates a weekly summary for a human to review.

cron:log-rotate.description: Rotates local logs on a schedule (nothing verifies the outcome).
